title: Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary
tagline: Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Sikkim

overview.short: Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary is a nature park in the Indian state of Sikkim.
overview.description: Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary is a nature park in the Indian state of Sikkim. It has forty species of rhododendron trees. It is located in the Yumthang Valley of Flowers north of Lachung in North Sikkim district. Bird species found in the park include Wood snipe and Hoary-throated barwing.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pakyong Airport, Gangtok (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (129 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shingba Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Yumthang Valley of Flowers.
